title: Decadent Crunchy Mediterranean Duck Confit
description: A rich and indulgent Mediterranean dish featuring crispy duck confit leg, served with a flavorful saute, macrobiotic-friendly ingredients and a crunchy texture.
instructions: Season the duck legs with salt and pepper.
Heat the olive oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat and sear the duck legs until browned on all sides.
Transfer the duck legs to a baking dish and roast in the oven for 20 minutes.
In the same skillet, add the minced garlic and cook for 1 minute.
Add the lemon juice, sliced olives, artichoke hearts, and sun dried tomatoes to the skillet and cook for 2 minutes.
Stir in the chopped parsley and cook for an additional minute.
To serve, place a roasted duck leg on each plate and top with the saute and crumbled feta cheese.
Garnish with additional parsley if desired.
Ensure poultry is cooked to an internal temperature of 74°C / 165°F (juices run clear, no pink remaining) before serving.
